entities.name: Sun
entities.description: A celestial body whose rays can be transformed into water; associated with Sulphur (Sol) and the solar reddening phase.

entities.name: Moon
entities.description: A celestial body that acts as a collecting tank or well for sunlight; associated with Mercurius (Luna) and the lunar tincture.

entities.name: Latona
entities.description: A code name for the prima materia during the phase of putrefaction and blackening (nigredo).

entities.name: Zodiac
entities.description: Twelve divisions of the heavens through which material must pass twelve gates to reach fixity.

attributes.subdivisions: three decans and thirty degrees per sign

entities.name: Horoscope
entities.description: The record of the constellations at the moment of birth, representing man's entanglement in fate.

entities.name: Primum Mobile
entities.description: The outermost planetary orbit, identified with God himself.

entities.name: Music of the Spheres
entities.description: A theory where planetary orbits produce audible harmonies based on mathematical ratios and orbital speeds.

entities.name: Earth's Tone
entities.description: A specific musical sequence (Mi Fa Mi) assigned by Kepler to the Earth.

summary: The passage explores the intersection of astronomy, alchemy, and music, detailing how celestial bodies like the Sun and Moon drive alchemical processes (nigredo/Latona). It describes the mathematical harmony of planetary orbits (Music of the Spheres) and the astrological significance of the zodiac and horoscopes in determining human fate.
